title: Core inflation hit an annual rate of 3.3% in April, as expected, Fed’s preferred gauge shows
summary_full: The PCE price index for April was expected to show an annual inflation rate of 3.8% for all items and 3.3% for core.
summary_public: The PCE price index for April was expected to show an annual inflation rate of 3.8% for all items and 3.3% for core.
